data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: tests/hooks/test-merge-conflict-regression.sh, tests/scripts/test-discover-agents.sh, tests/scripts/test-plugin-scripts-no-relative-paths.sh, tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh, config/agent-routing.conf, plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh, tests/scripts/run-script-tests.sh, tests/run-all.sh; exemplars read: none) ✓ Root causes: (1) merge-conflict-regression is at tests/hooks/ not tests/scripts/ — passes already. (2) discover-agents expects 9 stderr lines but routing conf has 10 categories. (3) design-approve.sh uses ../ relative path. (4) playwright test exceeds 60s timeout.
